use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PRIMARY IMMUNOGLOBULIN A NEPHROPATHY (IGAN) IN ADULTS AT RISK OF RAPID DISEASE PROGRESSION
TREATMENT OF PRIMARY IMMUNOGLOBULIN A NEPHROPATHY (IGAN) IN ADULTS AT RISK FOR DISEASE PROGRESSION

indications.text:
FILSPARI is indicated to reduce proteinuria in adults with primary immunoglobulin A
nephropathy (IgAN) at risk of rapid disease progression, generally a urine
protein-to-creatinine ratio (UPCR) ≥1.5 g/g.
3
Reference ID: 5128838
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling i...

FILSPARI is indicated to slow kidney function decline in adults with primary
immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN) who are at risk for disease progression.
